violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen(near 3 bay sink) was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (front entrance ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was (0 ) parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for (quaternary) sanitizer is (200-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
The (wall ) in the (walk in cooler ) area is in poor repair. Observed metal detached from wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (front of store ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (small accumulation of droppings in back storage room). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

1 dr refrigerator located in the (kitchen/front counter ) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures 48df. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the bakers storage rack have an accumulation of food residue and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
Prep sink is in poor repair. Leak observed at the pipes under the sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
Dumpster located in back outside area is in poor repair. Observed a missing door.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

The floors throughout kitchen area(under equipment) and walk in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
